description_long: This is a modern, spacious bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The structure features large windows, a double garage, and an open driveway with a car parked in front. The property includes a landscaped yard with several trees, a patio area with outdoor furniture, and a swimming pool set apart from the main building. There is a small detached structure, possibly a pool house or shed, and a fenced area that could serve as a pet enclosure. The exterior is finished in white and light gray tones, with wooden accents and paved walkways connecting the various outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, double garage, landscaped yard, patio, pool, and detached outbuildings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, driveway with car, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, patio with outdoor furniture, and detached pool house or shed.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the fenced area, additional trees, and the rear patio space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, patio, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the side facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and scattered side windows
